ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Sale price of the property */,
  "living_ft2" INTEGER /* Living area in square feet */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Days on market before sale */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., active, sold) */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed for sale */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "parking_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces */,
  "hoa_fees" TEXT /* Homeowners association fees */,
  "hoa_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of HOA fees (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Real estate license number */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency the agent is affiliated with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the agent (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the agent's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the agency */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the agency was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Agency website URL */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the agency's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "search_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for property search (e.g., location, price range) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent assigned to the client */,
  "pre_approved" INTEGER /* Whether the client has been pre-approved for a mortgage */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Client's budget for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client purchasing the property */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Final sale price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale occurred */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent facilitating the sale */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission earned by the agent */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., cash, mortgage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_houses" (
  "open_house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each open house event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property featured in the open house */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the open house event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the open house event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the open house event */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent conducting the open house */,
  "expected_attendees" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees */,
  "actual_attendees" INTEGER /* Actual number of attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("open_house_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_houses_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_houses_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being visited */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client visiting the property */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the scheduled visit */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent accompanying the client */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the visit taken by the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_visits_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_visits_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_visits_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the lead */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the lead */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the lead */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the lead was obtained (e.g., website, referral) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent following up with the lead */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up with the lead */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the lead (e.g., new, contacted, converted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis report */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was conducted */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the market analysis */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent responsible for the analysis */,
  "market_trend" TEXT /* Current market trend (e.g., increasing, stable, decreasing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the client (scale of 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the client */,
  "follow_up_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the agent in response to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_feedback_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_feedback_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., photo, virtual tour, floor plan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the video is associated with */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., virtual tour, walkthrough) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_videos_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the document is associated with */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., floor plan, inspection report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_documents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
